_meta.description: D6 fixtures for mastra / interrupt-headless. Same agent and LLM-layer responses as gen-ui-interrupt, but the frontend renders the time-picker in a separate app-surface pane via useHeadlessInterrupt. Mastra uses suspend/resume — the aimock fixture emits schedule_meeting tool calls which the adapter translates into tool-call-suspended events.
_meta.note: ported from interrupt-headless (langgraph-python); context rewritten to mastra

fixtures._comment: interrupt-headless sales-call pill — cancelled leg (user dismissed the picker). Cancel resumes with the SAME toolCallId as pick; only the tool-result payload differs, so gate on toolResultContains (aimock ≥ 1.37.0) and keep this leg BEFORE the confirmation leg (first match wins).

match.userMessage: intro call with the sales team

response.content: Denied — the sales intro call was not booked because no time slot was selected.

fixtures._comment: interrupt-headless sales-call pill — second leg: confirmation after user picks a slot. Placed BEFORE first-leg so toolCallId matching takes precedence over toolName matching.

match.userMessage: intro call with the sales team

response.content: Booked: Sales intro call confirmed for the slot you picked.

fixtures._comment: interrupt-headless alice-1on1 pill — cancelled leg. Same toolCallId as the pick path; discriminated by the tool-result payload via toolResultContains, ordered before the confirmation leg.

response.content: Denied — the 1:1 with Alice was not scheduled because no time slot was selected.

fixtures._comment: interrupt-headless alice-1on1 pill — second leg: confirmation after user picks a slot. Placed BEFORE first-leg so toolCallId matching takes precedence.

response.content: Scheduled: 1:1 with Alice locked in for the slot you picked.

fixtures._comment: interrupt-headless sales-call pill — first leg: schedule_meeting tool call triggers interrupt(...). Same agent/prompts as gen-ui-interrupt but different frontend (useHeadlessInterrupt renders in app surface pane, not inline).

match.userMessage: intro call with the sales team

response.content: Sure — let me check available times.

fixtures._comment: interrupt-headless alice-1on1 pill — first leg: schedule_meeting tool call.

response.content: Got it — pulling up next-week slots.
